title: Majaa
subTitle: Aadhi and Mathi, along with their father, go to a village and help a retired officer pay off his debts to a landlord. Soon, Mathi forcibly marries the landlord's daughter to teach him a lesson.

title: Neranja Manasu
subTitle: After the villagers of Suriyakudi choose Ayyanar to be their saviour, he puts Sivanandi in jail for killing his father. However, after many years, Sivanandi comes back to take his revenge.

title: Iravu Padagan
subTitle: Iravu Padagan

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Sigaram
subTitle: A genius music director, Damodaran, sinks into depression when his wife dies and his son, Krishna, becomes an alcoholic due to heartbreak. An old friend, Dr Priya, helps him with all his problems.

title: Punnagai Mannan
subTitle: Sethu and Ranjini are lovers who attempt suicide but Sethu survives and gets sent to prison for a year. Upon his release, he becomes a dance instructor where a student, Malini, falls in love with him.

title: Pasamalar
subTitle: Two siblings, Rajasekharan and Radha, become orphans when they lose their mother at a young age. Things take a turn when Rajasekharan's friend and employee, Anand, falls in love with Radha.

title: Salangai Oli
subTitle: Balakrishna, a trained Kuchipudi dancer, gets an opportunity to compete in a classical dance festival. However, two days prior to his performance, his mother passes away which leaves him devastated.

title: Student No. 1
subTitle: To fulfil his father's dreams, Aditya joins a law college, although his heart yearns to be an engineer. He tries to rehabilitate unruly students, while hiding his dark past.

title: Kadhal Kavithai
subTitle: Bringing the best in cinema.

title: Unnal Mudiyum Thambi
subTitle: A proud Carnatic music maestro wants his younger son, Udaymoorthy, to master the art as his elder son is without speech. However, Udaymoorthy is rather keen on social services.

title: Unnal Mudiyum Thambi
subTitle: A proud Carnatic music maestro wants his younger son, Udaymoorthy, to master the art as his elder son is without speech. However, Udaymoorthy is rather keen on social services.

title: April Maadhathil
subTitle: Kathir, a poor young man, and Shweta, a rich young girl, meet in college and fall in love. However, they are unable to confess their feelings to each other.

title: Rajadhi Raja
subTitle: Raja, a rich estate owner's son, comes back from abroad in order to avenge his dead father. However, things get complicated when he is framed, and he finds his doppelganger in his village.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Five Star
subTitle: Five college friends promise to stay together even after completing their education. However, one of them hides from the others that he has been forced to marry a village girl.

title: Gentleman
subTitle: Kicha is a modern-day Robin Hood, who along with his friend, Mani, steals from the rich to aid the poor. In society, he is a respected man who runs a small business.

title: Guna
subTitle: Guna, a mentally-disturbed man, imagines a fictitious character of a woman to be his future wife. One day, he sees a girl in a temple and assumes that she is his imaginary love and kidnaps her.

title: Thambikku Entha Ooru
subTitle: Seeing Balu's spendthrift and carefree attitude, his father sends him to his friend's house in a village to get reformed. Things get complicated when he gets entangled in a love triangle.

title: Coimbatore Mappillai
subTitle: When Balu moves to the city in search of career opportunities, he falls in love with Sumithra. However, Sumithra's evil cousin, Mahesh, creates a rift between their blooming love.

title: Panakkaran
subTitle: The illegitimate son of a rich man and a singer is raised by a poor drunkard. Before he can commit to the girl he loves, he wants to find out his biological parents.

title: Michael Madana Kama Rajan
subTitle: A wicked man separates a set of quadruplets after their birth, while one of them ends up with their biological father, the other three find new homes. However, chaos ensues when they cross paths.

title: Michael Madana Kama Rajan
subTitle: A wicked man separates a set of quadruplets after their birth, while one of them ends up with their biological father, the other three find new homes. However, chaos ensues when they cross paths.

title: Udhaya
subTitle: Udhaya falls in love with Vasanthi, but realises that she is already engaged. Later, when he is wrongly framed for a crime, she strives to prove his innocence.

title: Thotti Jaya
subTitle: An orphan named Thotti Jaya is hired by a mobster after he is spotted thrashing a dishonest man. However, his troubles begin when he falls in love with his boss' daughter.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Maaran
subTitle: Mathimaaaran, an honest journalist, exposes a fraud by Pazhani, a politician. As a result, it lands his career in trouble, while also threatening his family's safety.

title: 12 B
subTitle: A young man misses his bus while on his way to a job interview. The story explores the idea on both counts; what would happen if he gets the bus and what would happen if he misses it.

title: Vaaname Ellai
subTitle: Five people meet at a suicide point and decide to live their lives to the fullest for hundred days before ending their lives.

title: Yai Nee Romba Azhaga Irukke
subTitle: Hari, a young man, is in love with Raji, who does not reciprocate his feelings. Meanwhile, Swapna pursues Hari but is scorned when he rejects her and goes on to harass him.

title: Viyabari
subTitle: A zealous entrepreneur clones himself to balance his work and family life. However, after a tragic mishap, he realizes the unforeseen consequences of his actions.

title: Lovely
subTitle: Mahadevan does not believe in love and hates the word, but his daughter Nivedha loves Chandru. In order to get his consent, the couple comes up with an intricate plan and executes it.
